title: Calibration Protocol for Fluorescence Standard Curve with Fluorescein
author: Richard Tennant
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zgkf3uw
materials: You have now completed this calibration protocol

steps.title: Spin down fluorescein kit tube to...
steps.instruction: Spin down fluorescein kit tube to make sure pellet is at the bottom of tube Fluorescein Contributed by users

steps.title: Prepare 10x fluorescein stock solution (100...
steps.instruction: Prepare 10x fluorescein stock solution (100 μM) by resuspending fluorescein in 1mL of 1X PBS It is important that the fluorescein is properly dissolved. To check this, after the resuspension you should pipette up and down and examine the solution in the pipette tip – if any particulates are visible in the pipette tip continue to mix the solution until they disappear. PBS Contributed by users

steps.title: Dilute the 10X fluorescein stock solution...
steps.instruction: Dilute the 10X fluorescein stock solution with 1X PBS to make a 1X fluorescein solution with concentration 10 μM: 100 μL of 10X fluorescein stock into 900 μL 1X PBS

steps.title: Accurate pipetting is essential
steps.instruction: Accurate pipetting is essential. Serial dilutions will be performed across columns 1-11. Column 12 must contain PBS buffer only. Initially you will setup the plate with the fluorescein stock in column 1 and an equal volume of 1X PBS in columns 2 to 12. You will perform a serial dilution by consecutively transferring 100 μl from column to column with good mixing.

steps.title: Add 100 μl of 1X PBS​...
steps.instruction: Add 100 μl of 1X PBS​ into wells A2, B2, C2, D2....A12, B12, C12, D12

steps.title: Add 200 μl​ ​of fluorescein 1X...
steps.instruction: Add 200 μl​ ​of fluorescein 1X stock​ solution into A1, B1, C1, D1

steps.title: Transfer 100 μl of fluorescein stock...
steps.instruction: Transfer 100 μl of fluorescein stock solution from A1 into A2

steps.title: Mix A2 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A2 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A3

steps.title: Mix A3 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A3 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A4

steps.title: Mix A4 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A4 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A5

steps.title: Mix A5 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A5 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A6

steps.title: Mix A6 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A6 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A7

steps.title: Mix A7 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A7 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A8

steps.title: Mix A8 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A8 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A9

steps.title: Mix A9 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A9 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A10

steps.title: Mix A10 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A10 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into A11

steps.title: Mix A11 by pipetting up and...
steps.instruction: Mix A11 by pipetting up and down 3x and transfer 100 μl into ​liquid waste Take care not to continue serial dilution into column 12

steps.title: Repeat dilution series for rows B, C, D
steps.instruction: Repeat dilution series for rows B, C, D

steps.title: Measure fluorescence of all samples in instrument
steps.instruction: Measure fluorescence of all samples in instrument

steps.title: Record the data in your notebook
steps.instruction: Record the data in your notebook

steps.title: Import data into this Excel sheet...
steps.instruction: Import data into this Excel sheet provided (​fluorescein standard curve tab​): iGEM Data Analysis Template - Fluorescence Standard Curve - v1.xlsx
